title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by 0bps at their June 2026 meeting?

current.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 96%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: Fed-funds futures imply ~97% HOLD for the June 17 meeting; three consecutive holds and May CPI at 4.2% YoY foreclose any cut. I sit marginally below the market (96% vs 98.5%) on a small hike-tail from hawkish new Chair Warsh's debut; market overprices YES so no value bet.

history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 97%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: A hike at a single meeting in an established hold cycle is essentially unprecedented absent a crisis; CPI ~3.8% is not an emergency trigger and futures imply ~99% no-hike.
